titleStmt.title: SII 29.283: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 283. (A.R. No. B. 492 of 1961-62.) TAUNDI (Stavanidhi), CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the pedestal of Parśvanātha image (1) in the Brahmadēva temple.

It states that the image of Parśvanātha was consecrated by Lakshmīsēna-bhaṭṭāraka and the basadi was constructed by Laḷiyādēvi, the great-grand mother of Sēnarasa and a disciple of Vīranandisiddhānta-Chakravarti of Mūla-saṁgha, Dēsiya-gaṇa and Pustaka-gachchha. Sculptor Jinnōja carved the image.
It is dated Śaka 1(3)22, Vikrama, Chaitra Śu. 12 Monday which corresponds to 1400 A.D., March 8. [The month Chaitra was adhika].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī lakṣmīsēna bhaṭṭāraka
svāminā sthāpitaḥ śrī pā
rśvanāthaḥ śa 1(3)22

śrī mūla saṁgha dēśiyagaṇa pustakagacchada śrī vīraṇaṁdi
siddhāṁta cakravartidēvara guḍḍi sēnarasa muttavvela
ḷiyā dēviyaru māḍisida basadi rūvāri
jiṁnōjaṁ māḍida pratime maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī .

vikrama nāma saṁvatsara
caitra śu . 12 . sō
Digital edition of SII 29.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
